# Shri Parasram Holdings Pvt Ltd Panipat / Parasram Panipat

> Shri Parasram Holdings Pvt. Ltd. is one of the oldest and most trusted stock brokers in Panipat, Haryana. We offer free Demat accounts and comprehensive trading services including stocks, mutual funds, IPOs, unlisted shares, F&O, and commodities trading.

## Main Sections
- [Home](https://www.sphpnp.com/): Overview of our investment services, live charts, market dashboard, and daily research.
- [About Us](https://www.sphpnp.com/about): Our mission, vision, and trusted company background.
- [Team](https://www.sphpnp.com/team): Meet the expert team behind our financial success.
- [Services](https://www.sphpnp.com/services): Comprehensive financial services we offer including mutual funds and commodities.
- [Depository Services](https://www.sphpnp.com/depository-services): Secure and efficient depository services.
- [Unlisted Space](https://www.sphpnp.com/unlisted-space): Exclusive pre-IPO and unlisted shares investment opportunities.
- [Open Account](https://www.sphpnp.com/open-account): Open your free Demat and trading account with us.
- [Products](https://www.sphpnp.com/products): Financial products and advanced tools for traders.

## Trading Tools & Analysis
- [Screener](https://www.sphpnp.com/screener): Advanced stock screening and financial analysis tool.
- [F&O](https://www.sphpnp.com/fno): Futures and Options market data and insights.
- [52 Week Tracker](https://www.sphpnp.com/52-week-tracker): Track stocks hitting their 52-week highs and lows.
- [Compare](https://www.sphpnp.com/compare): Compare stocks and financial instruments side by side.
- [Brokerage Calculator](https://www.sphpnp.com/brokerage-calculator): Estimate your brokerage charges.
- [Margin Calculator](https://www.sphpnp.com/margin-calculator): Calculate required margins for trading.

## Education & Insights
- [Learn](https://www.sphpnp.com/learn): Educational hub for stock market beginners and experts.
- [Recommendations](https://www.sphpnp.com/learn/recommendations): Expert stock picks and daily investment recommendations.

## Corporate & Support
- [Contact Us](https://www.sphpnp.com/contact): Get in touch for support, queries, and assistance.
- [Careers](https://www.sphpnp.com/careers): Explore job opportunities and build your career with us.
- [Holidays](https://www.sphpnp.com/holidays): Market holiday calendar.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.sphpnp.com/privacy-policy): How we handle and protect your data.
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.sphpnp.com/cookie-policy): Information on our cookie usage.
